<style type="text/css" data-framer-css="true"></style><style>
#__framer-editorbar-container {
    align-items: center;
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
    position: fixed;
    z-index: calc(2147483647);
    width: max-content;
    cursor: pointer;
}

#__framer-editorbar-label {
    background-color: #111;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-family: "Inter", "Inter-Regular", system-ui, Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    height: fit-content;
    opacity: 0;
    padding: 4px 8px;
    transition: opacity 0.4s ease-out;
    font-weight: 500;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    position: fixed;
    width: max-content;
    pointer-events: none;
    user-select: none;
}

#__framer-editorbar-button {
    all: unset;
    align-items: center;
    border-radius: 15px;
    display: flex;
    height: 30px;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 30px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

#__framer-editorbar-label.__framer-editorbar-button-tooltip-visible {
    opacity: 1;
}

#__framer-editorbar-label, #__framer-editorbar-button {
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    background-color: rgba(34, 34, 34, 0.8);
    box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 2px 4px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px 1px 0px 0px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) 0px 0px 0px 1px;
    color: #fff;
}

#__framer-editorbar-loading-spinner {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    -webkit-mask: url(data:image/png;base64,);
    mask: url(data:image/png;base64,);
    -webkit-mask-size: 12px;
    mask-size: 12px;
    background-color: #fff;


    animation-duration: 800ms;
    animation-iteration-count: infinite;
    animation-name: __framer-loading-spin;
    animation-timing-function: linear;
}

@keyframes __framer-loading-spin {
    0% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
    }

    100% {
        transform: rotate(360deg);
    }
}
</style><style>
#__framer-editorbar {
    /* https://sergeyski.com/css-color-scheme-and-iframes-lessons-learned-from-disqus-background-bug */
    color-scheme: light dark;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: fixed;
    border: none;
    z-index: calc(2147483647);
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    touch-action: manipulation;
}

@supports (height: 100dvh) {
    #__framer-editorbar {
        height: 100dvh;
    }
}

#__framer-editorbar.status_hidden {
    display: none;
}

#__framer-editorbar.status_visually_hidden {
    clip-path: circle(1px at calc(100% - 1px) calc(100% - 1px));
    z-index: calc(2147483647 - 1);
}

#__framer-editorbar.status_measuring {
    clip-path: unset;
}
</style></head>

style="--font-selector:SW50ZXItU2VtaUJvbGQ=;--framer-font-open-type-features:'ss01' on, 'ss02' on, 'ss03' on, 'ss04' on, 'ss07' on, 'cv06' on, 'cv13' on, 'cv07' on, 'cv05' on, 'cv08' on, 'cv10' on, 'cv12' on;--framer-font-size:32px;--framer-font-weight:600;--framer-letter-spacing:-1.5px;--framer-line-height:42px;--framer-text-alignment:left" class="framer-text">Claude Design launched today, and I spent the morning putting it through its paces to see if Anthropic's new design tool lives up to the hype.</p></div></div></div><div class="ssr-variant"><!--$--><style>.framer-text {
                    scroll-margin-top: 80px;
                }</style><div class="framer-1wxlqd3" data-framer-name="Content" id="content" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="transform:none"><h2 dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-pjpht8" id="what-is-claude-design">What is Claude Design?</h2><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">Claude Design is a new product from Anthropic that helps you create <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/product/ai-prototype-generator" target="_blank" rel="noopener">prototypes</a><!--/$-->, slides, one-pagers, marketing assets, and interactive experiences using Claude models. So far, it's available to Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscribers.</p><img alt="" width="1000" height="626" src="https://framerusercontent.com/images/JrD3ShtSWAjGmg30yP2P6U7W4To.png" srcset="https://framerusercontent.com/images/JrD3ShtSWAjGmg30yP2P6U7W4To.png?scale-down-to=512&width=2000&height=1252 512w,https://framerusercontent.com/images/JrD3ShtSWAjGmg30yP2P6U7W4To.png?scale-down-to=1024&width=2000&height=1252 1024w,https://framerusercontent.com/images/JrD3ShtSWAjGmg30yP2P6U7W4To.png?width=2000&height=1252 2000w" class="framer-text framer-image framer-styles-preset-1jqnst8" style="aspect-ratio:2000 / 1252" sizes="(min-width: 1280px) 100vw, (min-width: 1024px) and (max-width: 1279.98px) 100vw, (max-width: 1023.98px) 100vw"><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">It is powered by Claude Opus 4.7, Anthropic's most capable publicly available vision model, which also launched today. The tool lives at <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://claude.ai/design" rel="noopener">claude.ai/design</a><!--/$-->.</p><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">Anthropic sees Claude Design as useful for two main groups. Designers can explore more ideas without worrying about time limits. Founders, product managers, and marketers without design experience can turn their ideas into visuals without using <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/blog/figma-ai-tools-and-features" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Figma</a><!--/$--> or hiring a designer.</p><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl"><!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/product/figma-ai-generator" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><em class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">Go from Text-to-Figma, free ></strong></em></a><!--/$--></p><h2 dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-pjpht8" id="claude-design-features">Claude Design Features</h2><h3 dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-tiwmud" id="text-to-any-design">Text-to-any-design</h3><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">You start with a text prompt, Claude Design will ask you some clarifying questions in the form of a short quiz and will begin generating a first version, and you go from there.</p><img alt="" width="1000" height="626" src="https://framerusercontent.com/images/Dw8p2jZztAXuNcVSBgC1JQ7csY.png" srcset="https://framerusercontent.com/images/Dw8p2jZztAXuNcVSBgC1JQ7csY.png?scale-down-to=512&width=2000&height=1252 512w,https://framerusercontent.com/images/Dw8p2jZztAXuNcVSBgC1JQ7csY.png?scale-down-to=1024&width=2000&height=1252 1024w,https://framerusercontent.com/images/Dw8p2jZztAXuNcVSBgC1JQ7csY.png?width=2000&height=1252 2000w" class="framer-text framer-image framer-styles-preset-1jqnst8" style="aspect-ratio:2000 / 1252" sizes="(min-width: 1280px) 100vw, (min-width: 1024px) and (max-width: 1279.98px) 100vw, (max-width: 1023.98px) 100vw"><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">It offers a wider range of outputs than most <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="../product" target="_blank">AI design tools</a><!--/$-->. It can create app prototypes, web pages, pitch decks, social media assets, one-pagers, and what Anthropic calls "frontier design": code-powered experiences with voice, video, 3D visuals, and special effects. </p><h3 dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-tiwmud" id="editing-and-tweaking">Editing and tweaking</h3><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">After Claude creates the first version, you can refine it in several ways. You can chat with Claude to ask for changes, leave comments on specific parts, edit text directly, or use custom sliders for that design. These sliders let you adjust spacing, color, and layout in real time without needing to write a prompt.</p><img alt="" width="1000" height="584" src="https://framerusercontent.com/images/R6rk4dt1Zu0GWMGbg2cuWucZRg.png" srcset="https://framerusercontent.com/images/R6rk4dt1Zu0GWMGbg2cuWucZRg.png?scale-down-to=512&width=2000&height=1168 512w,https://framerusercontent.com/images/R6rk4dt1Zu0GWMGbg2cuWucZRg.png?scale-down-to=1024&width=2000&height=1168 1024w,https://framerusercontent.com/images/R6rk4dt1Zu0GWMGbg2cuWucZRg.png?width=2000&height=1168 2000w" class="framer-text framer-image framer-styles-preset-1jqnst8" style="aspect-ratio:2000 / 1168" sizes="(min-width: 1280px) 100vw, (min-width: 1024px) and (max-width: 1279.98px) 100vw, (max-width: 1023.98px) 100vw"><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">This design choice makes Claude Design feel more like a real <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/definitions/figma-design-system" target="_blank" rel="noopener">design environment</a><!--/$--> instead of just a chatbox with a preview window.</p><h3 dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-tiwmud" id="design-system-integration">Design system integration</h3><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">During new project setup, Claude Design can read your codebase and design files to create a design system for your team. After that, every project uses your colors, fonts, and components automatically. It's as good as having a separate <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/blog/design-md-guide" target="_blank" rel="noopener">design.md</a><!--/$--> file. Teams can update the system over time and keep more than one if needed.</p><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl"><!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/product/ai-design-system-generator" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><em class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">Generate Design System with AI, free ></strong></em></a><!--/$--></p><h3 dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-tiwmud" id="import-from-anywhere">Import from anywhere</h3><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">You can start by uploading images and documents (DOCX, PPTX, XLSX), or connect Claude to your codebase. The Claude Code handoff is the feature that makes it more than just another <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/product/ai-ui-generator" target="_blank" rel="noopener">AI design generator</a><!--/$-->. The ability to go from a text prompt to a working prototype to production code, all in one conversation, is a genuinely different workflow from anything that existed a year ago. So, for now, it is the most capable AI design tool available to anyone with a Claude subscription, and it launched today.</p><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl"><strong class="framer-text">For those otherwise, </strong><!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="../"><strong class="framer-text">Banani AI </strong></a><!--/$--><strong class="framer-text">is a strong alternative that can do most of what Claude Design can; with a never-expiring free tier of ~170 credits/month!</strong></p><div class="framer-text framer-text-module" style="width:fit-content;height:auto;overflow:hidden;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto" data-width="fit"><!--$--><a class="framer-I94qq framer-15szhzx framer-v-iji292 framer-xxq0o8" data-framer-name="Medium Hover" data-highlight="true" href="https://app.banani.co/auth/signup" rel="noopener" style="background-color:rgb(0, 0, 0);border-bottom-left-radius:50px;border-bottom-right-radius:50px;border-top-left-radius:50px;border-top-right-radius:50px;opacity:0.75"><div class="framer-1179onw" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-r6o4lv: var(--variable-reference-brlj1sPjV-t1i1vzSne); Access requires a paid Claude Pro, Max, Team, or Enterprise subscription; starting at $20/month (or $17/month annually). </p><h4 dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-qne132" id="is-claude-ai-good-for-design">Is Claude.ai good for design?</h4><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">Yes, for many design use cases, Claude Design AI can generate functional websites, <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/product/ai-prototype-generator" target="_blank" rel="noopener">interactive prototypes</a><!--/$-->, <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/blog/miro-pricing#:~:text=Making%20a%20deck%20for%20product%20team%20alignment%20in%20Miro" target="_blank" rel="noopener">styled pitch decks</a><!--/$-->, and <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/product/ai-mockup-generator" target="_blank" rel="noopener">UI mockups </a><!--/$-->entirely from a text prompt. No design experience required. </p><h4 dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-qne132" id="is-claude-design-better-than-figma">Is Claude Design better than Figma? </h4><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">Depends on who's using it. Claude Design is a credible replacement for PMs, developers, and freelancers who want visuals without learning <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/product/figma-ai-generator" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Figma</a><!--/$-->, but more of a complement for professional designers. However, where Figma has an edge are real-time collaboration, <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/blog/design-md-guide" target="_blank" rel="noopener">persistent design systems</a><!--/$-->, precise vector illustration, and <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/product/figma-to-code-ai" target="_blank" rel="noopener">developer handoff</a><!--/$-->.</p><h4 dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-qne132" id="can-claude-design-generate-figma-ui">Can Claude Design generate Figma UI? </h4><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">Not directly. Direct, editable <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/product/image-to-figma" target="_blank" rel="noopener">export to Figma</a><!--/$--> isn't part of the launch feature set — so expect to rebuild in Figma if that's your final destination. Claude does have a Figma MCP integration via Claude Code, but it has limited rollout.</p><h4 dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-qne132" id="is-there-an-open-source-alternative-to-claude-design">Is there an open-source alternative to Claude Design?</h4><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1gsh6sl">Yes, <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/blog/claude-design-alternatives-free#:~:text=Figma%20Make%20Alternatives%20%3E-,Open%20Design%3A%20Open%2DSource%20AI%20Design,-Open%20Design%20is" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><strong class="framer-text">Open Design</strong> is a viral open-source alternative to Claude Design</a><!--/$-->. But you need to bring your own API key to use it; so, it costs nonetheless. If you're looking for something free to start with, <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1k25z1h" href="https://www.banani.co/blog/claude-design-alternatives-free#:~:text=Banani%3A%20An%20Unlikely%20360%C2%B0%20Alternative" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><strong class="framer-text">Banani AI</strong> </a><!--/$-->is a good option to check out.</p></div><!--/$--></div><div class="framer-111ztwt" data-framer-name="Banner"><div class="framer-1x2k0im"><div class="framer-1wu3m9w"><div class="framer-1tfxia8"><div class="framer-1l378pa" data-framer-name="Title" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="transform:none"><h2 class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-pjpht8" data-styles-preset="uJRQF2kyT" dir="auto" style="--framer-text-color:rgb(255, 255, 255)">Generate UI designs using AI</h2></div></div><div class="framer-1ln23gn" data-framer-name="Title" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="transform:none"><p dir="auto" style="--framer-font-open-type-features:'ss01' on, 'ss02' on, 'ss03' on, 'ss04' on, 'cv12' on, 'cv10' on, 'cv08' on, 'cv05' on, 'cv07' on, 'cv13' on, 'cv06' on;--framer-font-size:18px;--framer-letter-spacing:0px;--framer-line-height:30px;--framer-text-color:rgb(255, 255, 255)" class="framer-text">Convert your ideas into beautiful and user-friendly designs.
